briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: init method \par \b I/O\/ \: Input -> Output \par \b Complexity\/ \: 5
\par \b Purpose\/ \: _postprocess_lines method \par \b I/O\/ \: Input -> Output \par \b Complexity\/ \: 5
\par \b Purpose\/ \: LawStructureExtractor for document structure extraction pipeline

detaileddescription.para: This class is used for extraction structure from common laws.
You can find the description of this type of structure in the section :ref:simple_law_structure.
